_comment: Canonical BZ-reconciliation radii tuple (audit Codex-M2, 2026-04-21). Both CMakeLists.txt and bz_check.py read from this file so the BZ gate binds to a single source. Deployments that change runtime radii must update this file AND re-run bz_check. K=36 campaign radii live here; K=40 campaign adds its own K_SQ entry when a deployment is planned.
